name: Vishal Ranjan
headline: Serial Entrepreneur | Founder of IMARC Group, Claight Corporation & KAMRIT Financial Services
tagline: Building IMARC, Claight, and KAMRIT, and a small army of practical tools along the way.
bio: Vishal Ranjan is a serial entrepreneur and market research visionary who has built two globally recognized market research firms serving Fortune 500 companies across 100+ countries. He founded IMARC Group in 2005 and Claight Corporation (Expert Market Research), growing them to a combined team of 380+ professionals across the USA, India, UK, Australia, Vietnam, and Philippines with consistent 40%+ annual growth. He also founded KAMRIT Financial Services LLP, India's trusted compliance partner serving 10,000+ businesses. Vishal holds an MBA from FMS Delhi, a Master's in International Business from IIFT, and a B.E. in Chemical Engineering from Savitribai Phule Pune University.
shortBio: Serial entrepreneur. Founder of IMARC Group, Claight Corporation & KAMRIT Financial Services. Building the future of market intelligence.
alsoKnownAs: Vishal Ranjan, founder of Claight Corporation
Vishal Ranjan, founder of KAMRIT Financial Services
disambiguation: There are several public figures named Vishal Ranjan. This site is the official personal site of the Vishal Ranjan who founded IMARC Services Private Limited, Claight Corporation, and KAMRIT Financial Services LLP.
